routes.description: Checks whether the authenticated user is currently in an active game session. Returns full session details if a game exists, otherwise returns exist: false.
Allows the user to formally leave their current game session. This removes them from the game in Redis and notifies the opponent via Socket.io ('playerLeft').

body.message: User is not in a game

routes.description: Ends the entire game session for all participants and clears all related state from Redis. Notifies all room members via Socket.io ('gameEnded').

integrationTips.reconnection: On app mount, call GET /session. If exist is true, rejoin the room via socket using the gameCode.
integrationTips.cleanup: Use POST /leave if the user manually exits the game screen. Use POST /end if the game is logically over or needs to be forcefully terminated.
